title: Error Handling + Retry Logic
summary: Enhanced agent orchestrator with comprehensive error handling, automatic retry with exponential backoff, screenshot capture on error, strategy adaptation integration, user-friendly error reporting, and alert system integration for repeated failures.

changes.description: Enhanced error handling throughout the agent execution pipeline
details: Added error classification (recoverable vs fatal) using ErrorType metadata in executeTool catch block
Added automatic screenshot capture on error for browser/GHL tools via stagehand service
Enhanced tool failure handling in agent loop with exponential backoff (1s, 4s, 16s)
Integrated strategy adaptation service to record action results for learning on both success and failure
Non-retryable errors (auth failure, invalid input, CAPTCHA) now skip retries and fail immediately
Added user-friendly error explanation via explainError() in SSE events during failures
Wired failed executions to alerting service with in-app notifications including error context
Wired fatal execution errors to alerting service with critical priority
Added fallback suggestion support from recovery strategies

changes.description: Added new error pattern matchers for better user-facing error messages
details: Added CAPTCHA detection pattern with explanation and suggested actions
Added session expired pattern with recovery suggestions
Added page crash/disconnect pattern with retry guidance

existingInfrastructureLeveraged: server/services/intelligence/strategyAdaptation.service.ts - Action result recording for site-specific learning
server/services/executionRetry.service.ts - Existing execution-level retry (already wired in agent router)
server/lib/errorTypes.ts - Error classification, severity, retryability metadata
server/services/alerting.service.ts - In-app notification creation for failure alerts
server/api/routers/agent.ts - retryExecution endpoint already exists for client retry button
server/_core/agent-sse-events.ts - SSE emitter for real-time error reporting

verification.errorFlow: Agent hits error -> classifyError determines type -> if retryable, failureRecovery.recover() runs with backoff -> strategy adaptation records result -> if all retries fail, alerting.createNotification() fires -> emitExplainedError() sends user-friendly SSE event
